problem: Consider the OECD countries whose total population was composed of at least 20% of foreign-born populations as of 2023 (according to the Observatory of Migration at the university of Oxford). Amongst them, which country saw their overall criminality score increase by at least +0.2 point between 2021 and 2023 and their resilience score decrease by more than 0.3 between these same dates (according to the Organised Crime Index)?

args.query: OECD countries foreign-born population 2023 Observatory of Migration University of Oxford
share of foreign-born population in OECD countries for 2023 or the latest available year, listing countries with at least 20%
foreign-born population as a share of total population in OECD countries for 2023 or the latest available year, listing countries with at least 20%
OECD countries with at least 20% foreign-born population, along with their percentages and the year of the data (preferably 2023).
Organised Crime Index Luxembourg 2021 2023 criminality score resilience score
Organised Crime Index Switzerland 2021 2023 criminality score resilience score
Organised Crime Index Australia 2021 2023 criminality score resilience score
Organised Crime Index New Zealand 2021 2023 criminality score resilience score
Observatory of Migration University of Oxford foreign-born population OECD countries 2023 percentages

Organised Crime Index Ireland 2021 2023 criminality score resilience score

problem: According to the NHS England Statistical Release Breastfeeding Initiation & Breastfeeding Prevalence 6-8 weeks (Quarter 1 2015/16), which 5 trusts with under 500 maternities achieved the lowest breastfeeding initiation rate? Order them from lowest rate to highest.
answer: South Tyneside NHS Foundation Trust, George Eliot Hospital NHS Trust, Gateshead Health NHS Foundation Trust, Isle Of Wight NHS Trust, Wye Valley NHS Trust

args.query: NHS England Statistical Release Breastfeeding Initiation & Breastfeeding Prevalence 6-8 weeks (Quarter 1 2015/16)
Table containing breastfeeding initiation rates by trust with total maternities. Identify trusts with under 500 maternities and their breastfeeding initiation rates.
